title: Skill Garden
summary: A recruiter-friendly portfolio experiment where project metadata grows a generated 3D landscape instead of a flat case-study list.

title: Ops Orbit
summary: A release observability dashboard that combined deployment telemetry, incident context, and service ownership into one operational view.

title: Studio Notes
summary: A collaborative note workspace for design reviews that reduced context-switching and made decision logs easy to search later.

title: Parcel Path
summary: A logistics planning tool that surfaced route constraints and SLA risk early, helping teams choose better delivery strategies.

title: Signal Room
summary: A compact experimentation platform for product analytics events, built to validate tracking changes before they reached production.
